fields.name: Internal Trade
fields.value: For trade between two players, please use "Transfer". This is not to be confused with the ingame Mission-Type "Transfer", which is designated for transfer of ISK between multiple characters of the same players. To deposit/withdraw, use the corresponding buttons.

fields.name: Tip
fields.value: The number may be entered as a pure number (e.g. "1000000"), or using the Format "1,000,000.00 ISK" or similar. A comma (,) is interpreted as a thousand-seperator. Letters are ignored.

fields.name: Reference field
fields.value: This field is **optional**, so please just don't enter anything, especially no placeholders like Minuses, Slashes and so on. This field can be used to provide additional data like job numbers and is/was used only for some specific cases.

fields.name: Grey buttons
fields.value: No touchy-touchy, those who need to use them know what they do, for everyone else they are useless.

fields.name: Note
fields.value: Transfer is for trading between Players, Deposit/Withdraw is used to deposit/receive real ISK ingame. Reference field is optional.
